blocking_findings.title: Helper ownership unresolved
blocking_findings.summary: The original plan moved helpers that depended on root-local asArray and normalizeString without stating a cycle-free helper strategy.

blocking_findings.title: Public re-export mapping incomplete
blocking_findings.summary: The original plan did not enumerate moved re-exports and unchanged re-exports.

blocking_findings.title: summarizeFrontendAcceptance migration ambiguity
blocking_findings.summary: The original plan did not explicitly keep summarizeFrontendAcceptance in frontend-acceptance.js despite existing direct consumers.

non_blocking_findings.title: Parity artifact should require deterministic same-input/same-output projection JSON equivalence
Timeline module import of GOVERNANCE_AUDIT_SKILL_TRIAL_EVENT should be explicit

required_followups: Post-extraction DeepSeek code review must verify no AGENT_LIFECYCLE_EVENT_TYPES root public export, mobile projection equivalence, moved re-export preservation, and no import cycles.
